The podcast is a discussion of the past week’s news about Star Atlas. If you are interested in being on the podcast, please contact us. We are launching a Star Atlas merch store. summary.historical_value: Contemporary Intergalactic Herald publication preserved with role and attribution boundaries.
summary.current_validity_warning: Summaries, roadmaps, operational details, and attributed statements require reconciliation with primary and later sources.

article_text:
Welcome to the Star Atlas weekly recap from the Intergalactic Herald. Below is what happened with Star Atlas this past week.
We are looking for guests to be on our podcast. The podcast is a discussion of the past week’s news about Star Atlas. If you are interested in being on the podcast, please contact us.
We are launching a Star Atlas merch store. Please check it out at Intergalactic Gear.
We are creating a “non-guild” guild. If you are interested in learning more, please go to Intergalactic Coalition.
If you would like to support our efforts, donations can be sent to intergalacticherald.sol
Metaverse Nomads #124 Star Atlas December Releases – DAC Platform
Metaverse Nomads posted a video replay of their weekly Star Atlas livestream.
WEEKLY STAR ATLAS NEWSLETTER #109
Aephia published their weekly Star Atlas newsletter.
Star Atlas: Crafting Fimbul Mamba EX!!!!!
Beyond the Horizon posted a video of crafting the Fimbul Mamba EX in SAGE Labs.
Honeyland + Star Atlas Collaboration Details
Honeyland announced their collaboration with Star Atlas.
Star Atlas Golden Era 3D RELEASE!!
Atlas Theory posted a video about the upcoming release of SAGE 3D.
The Atlas Brew #92
Star Atlas TV posted a video replay of the latest Atlas Brew.
STAR ATLAS #213 3D Game Update in Less Than 24 Hours!
MetaVerse Explorer posted a video about the latest updates in Star Atlas.
Star Atlas Brew #92: The Next 10 Days – TLDR
TLDR posted a video recap of the latest Atlas Brew.
[LIVE] STAR ATLAS SAGE 3D FIRST IMPRESSIONS
MetaVerse Explorer did a video livestream of playing SAGE 3D.
Star Atlas New Trailer Reaction and Poster Giveaway
Beyond the Horizon posted a video about his reaction to the new Star Atlas trailer.
My First Hour in STAR ATLAS Golden Era (SAGE 3D)
Atlas Theory did a video livestream of play SAGE 3D.
